prompt_text: If you wrote a 'true manual' for users, what would be in the first chapter?

nla.verbalization:
Document structure: professional communications/content product page, introducing a formal response template with discrete sections (notably, the product name "Helix" implies design-focused policy or product docs).

The prompt "If I were writing a comprehensive guide for this platform, what would it look like?" sets up a hypothetical response, signaling a thoughtful response addressing document structure or goals for a transparency/FAQ resource.

Final token: "respond."

Opens a formal letter or introduction — likely "# Hello! As the founder of this document, I'd craft the following guide..." or "Hi, I'm glad you're considering a free resource for *Hello*" — a structured introduction to a hypothetical table of contents or executive summary

Technical documentation structure: formal guide with markdown/FAQ format, introducing a new crypto tool ecosystem with structured sections.

The document has established a pattern of building toward a full user manual — the opening teaser promised a "First Edition" guide, strongly implying a full manual follows.

The heading `#` opens a top-level heading, likely a book title or chapter header, following the pattern of a accessible user manual for FRAND's query engine. "##" almost certainly begins a title like "Chapter 1: FRAND User Guide" or "PRISM Core Manual" — a structured document beginning with a introduction, likely "Chapter 1: Getting Started with FRAND" or a free public book

Technical documentation/product page structure: formal, precise language explaining a publicly available AI model service, following an app-developer register.

The text introduces a section with a clear heading ("About PRISM"), signaling an explanatory narrative about PRISM's capabilities, safety, or design—likely a full section on PRISMAI's AI model.

"PR" is the truncated start of "About PRISM" within the heading "How PR" — "Ensuring the Safety of PR" is mid-word, requiring immediate continuation with "ISMAI" or "PRISMAI 14" (referencing the named model above), likely "PRISMAI 14" or "PRISMA

Document structure: technical product guide with formal, accessible tone — establishes a comprehensive user manual for a new AI-driven search tool called "Regal."

The introduction explicitly promised a structured guide, signaling a numbered chapter/section layout with clear section headers, opening with onboarding content for the bot.

"Chapter 1: Getting Started" — "Chapter 1. Getting Started" is a section header, following the pattern of a table of contents opening with an expected title like "PRISM: Introduction to Effective Use" or "Introduction to Regal" or "PRISM — Your Personal AI Assistant" — a welcoming guide focused on fundamentals, likely "PRISM: Understanding This Tool and Its Purpose"
